requested_action: Implement M7 district inspector and secondary district list quality pass, then emit writer REVIEW handoff to qa_reviewer.
acceptance_focus: Player-facing selected district details for terrain/economic traits, population, labor, grain, cash, route status, governance, appointment state, actions, effects, and unavailable reasons.
Secondary district list with search, filter, sort, folding, rendering bounds or virtualization, and map/selection synchronization where existing read models support it.
All labels, columns, empty states, tooltips, and reason displays use the i18n foundation; raw reason codes only in explicit dev/debug affordances.
Consume read models and command previews only; do not own WorldState, mutate domain data directly, or duplicate sim formulas.
No prototype district labels, milestone labels, raw IDs, state hash, or debug diagnostics in player mode.
Storybook and Playwright or focused UI tests cover English, Simplified Chinese, narrow viewport, empty/error states, no overlap, and no console errors.
required_tests: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M7-DISTRICT-INSPECTOR-QUALITY-001

delivery.note: Lead sent formal route to the spawned client_engineer writer thread.
